name: hallway
hints: A hallway with an archway blocked by a giant oyster, and a flute.
GET FLU - the flute is needed to charm the cobra in the sitting room.
The oyster blocks the archway. You need to get past it somehow.
PLA FLU (play flute) in the sitting room to charm the cobra. The oyster can be moved or opened for a pearl treasure. GO ARC once the oyster is dealt with. W=dining hall (12).
notes: Hallway with oyster blocking archway and flute. Flute is needed to charm cobra in sitting room. Oyster contains black pearl treasure. GO ARC leads to altar room (14). W=dining hall (12).
